sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64044" key="lugo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῠγόω</orth>, <sense id="n64044.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tie fast</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἱμάντι κατ᾽ αὐχένος ἅμμα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.150</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Antip.); <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀλυκτοπέδῃσι λυγωθείς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.15</biblScope></bibl></cit>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n64044.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bend, overpower</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Δανάας ἐλύγωσεν ὅδε φρένα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.216</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Paul. Sil.).</sense> </entryFree>
